coverage: A U.S. price snapshot using BLS national average prices where available and Walmart national listings for items BLS doesn't track.
reviewCadence: Quarterly price re-audit, with monthly monitoring of relevant BLS average-price releases.
limitations: This isn't a live price feed. Your store, ZIP code, package size, and sale price may differ.
Published costs use the package, edible-fraction, and consumed-amount rules described in the methodology.
The public CSVs document the ranking inputs, but they don't yet include a source URL or observation date for every row.
